a395ee82:
def solve_a395ee82(grid):
    grid = [row[:] for row in grid]
    H, W = len(grid), len(grid[0])
    bg = grid[0][0]
    pixels = defaultdict(set)
    for r in range(H):
        for c in range(W):
            if grid[r][c] != bg:
                pixels[grid[r][c]].add((r,c))
    colors = list(pixels.keys())
    shape_col = marker_col = None
    shape = isolated = None
    for col in colors:
        positions = pixels[col]
        visited = set()
        components = []
        for pos in positions:
            if pos not in visited:
                comp = set()
                q = deque([pos])
                while q:
                    p = q.popleft()
                    if p in visited:
                        continue
                    visited.add(p)
                    comp.add(p)
                    r, c = p
                    for nr, nc in [(r-1,c),(r+1,c),(r,c-1),(r,c+1)]:
                        if (nr,nc) in positions and (nr,nc) not in visited:
                            q.append((nr,nc))
                components.append(comp)
        if len(components) == 2:
            if len(components[0]) == 1:
                isolated = list(components[0])[0]
                shape = components[1]
                shape_col = col
            elif len(components[1]) == 1:
                isolated = list(components[1])[0]
                shape = components[0]
                shape_col = col
    if shape_col is None:
        return grid
    marker_col = [c for c in colors if c != shape_col][0]
    marker_positions = pixels[marker_col]
    sh_rows = [r for r,c in shape]
    sh_cols = [c for r,c in shape]
    sh_min_r, sh_max_r = min(sh_rows), max(sh_rows)
    sh_min_c, sh_max_c = min(sh_cols), max(sh_cols)
    sh_h = sh_max_r - sh_min_r + 1
    sh_w = sh_max_c - sh_min_c + 1
    sh_cr = (sh_min_r + sh_max_r) / 2.0
    sh_cc = (sh_min_c + sh_max_c) / 2.0
    shape_offsets = [(r - sh_cr, c - sh_cc) for r,c in shape]
    marker_offsets = [(r - isolated[0], c - isolated[1]) for r,c in marker_positions]
    all_abs = [abs(x) for mo in marker_offsets for x in mo if x != 0]
    if all_abs:
        m_step = all_abs[0]
        for x in all_abs:
            m_step = math.gcd(m_step, x)
    else:
        m_step = 1
    row_scale = sh_h / m_step
    col_scale = sh_w / m_step
    for r, c in marker_positions:
        grid[r][c] = bg
    grid[isolated[0]][isolated[1]] = bg
    for r, c in shape:
        grid[r][c] = marker_col
    for (mr, mc) in marker_offsets:
        copy_cr = sh_cr + mr * row_scale
        copy_cc = sh_cc + mc * col_scale
        for (dr, dc) in shape_offsets:
            nr = round(copy_cr + dr)
            nc = round(copy_cc + dc)
            if 0 <= nr < H and 0 <= nc < W:
                grid[nr][nc] = shape_col
    return grid
